<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Treatment with Talzenna should be initiated and supervised by a physician experienced in the use of anticancer medicinal products. Patient selection Breast cancer: Patients should be selected for the...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>HER2 positive breast carcinoma（99.0%）</li>
<li>HIV infectious disease（98.5%）</li>
<li>progesterone-receptor negative breast cancer（98.3%）</li>
<li>normal breast-like subtype of breast carcinoma（98.3%）</li>
<li>progesterone-receptor positive breast cancer（98.3%）</li>
<li>breast tumor luminal A or B（98.3%）</li>
<li>multiple endocrine neoplasia（98.3%）</li>
<li>primary release disorder of platelets（98.1%）</li>
<li>feline acquired immunodeficiency syndrome（98.1%）</li>
<li>simian immunodeficiency virus infection（98.1%）</li>
<li>breast fibrocystic disease（97.7%）</li>
<li>pseudo-von Willebrand disease（97.4%）</li>
<li>cytomegalovirus infection（97.4%）</li>
<li>neurodevelopmental disorder with ataxic gait, absent speech, and decreased cortical white matter（97.4%）</li>
<li>malignant catarrh（97.3%）</li>
<li>infectious bovine rhinotracheitis（97.3%）</li>
<li>Glanzmann thrombasthenia（97.3%）</li>
<li>female breast carcinoma（97.3%）</li>
<li>drug-induced osteoporosis（97.2%）</li>
<li>benign mammary dysplasia（97.0%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
